content.en:
Enlightenment!

Or enlightenment!

Ye Tian didn't care about the consequences of using the weird blood pupil, as long as he could comprehend a little more mystery, it would be worth it.

However, if he wanted to stay here all the time and be alone, it was obviously impossible.

There are too many half-step extradimensional realms and extradimensional realms that have poured here, and the territory of Seven Thousand and One is so large, and there are so many traces of extradimensional rules, and a half-step superdimensional realm comprehends a trace of extradimensional rules, which is obviously not enough.

So, there must be arguments.

Really.

Soon after, several half-step extradimensional realms came here, all apparently from a single force.

"There is actually a trace of extradimensional rules here, if we meditate here, it will help us improve the power of extradimensionality!!!"

These half-step extradimensional realms were very excited.

Of course, they also saw Ye Tian, but they didn't care.

They have all refined their superdimensional bodies to more than ninety percent of the half-step superdimensional realm, and their superdimensional power has also been refined to the Dacheng realm.

Moreover, the extra-dimensional bloodline they fused was also extremely powerful, although there was no hope of breaking through to the super-dimensional realm, but the strength was at the peak level of the half-step super-dimensional realm.

Together, the three of them are enough to fight against any half-step extradimensional realm.

If they get an amazing opportunity and comprehend a trace of extradimensional rules, if they have a chance to go against the sky in the future, they will not have no hope of reversing the physical body, eliminating the superdimensional bloodline, changing their lives against the sky, and forcibly stepping into the superdimensional realm.

Although there may not be one half-step transcendent realm for infinite years to achieve this step, at least there is a glimmer of hope.

Of course.

Their goal is not so big, they just want to find a trace of extradimensional rules here, comprehend more, and improve some strength, this is their goal.

"Drive him away!"

The three half-step extradimensional realms came to Ye Tian's vicinity, revealing their breath one by one.

"Get out of the way, we've got this place!"

These three half-step extradimensional realms said coldly.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian didn't even turn around, he only said one word.

This made the three half-step transcendent realms very annoyed, they were the top half-step extradimensional realms, Ye Tian even dared to speak like this.

"Do it!"

They are not afraid of offending Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian has a backer behind him, they also have a backer!

They are from the half-step extradimensional realm of a powerful force, and the force they are in is also a superdimensional realm existence with a second realm, so they are not afraid of Ye Tian at all.

Not only is the top existence of the Six Thousand Realm also the extra-dimensional realm of the second realm, but there is no extra-dimensional realm of the third realm, who is afraid of whom!

Thundered!!!!

The three half-step transcendent realms all moved together and killed Ye Tian.

Wow!

Ye Tian turned around, the super-dimensional power of the consummation realm exploded, the super-dimensional body erupted, and the terrifying aura swept around.

"Broken!"

An aurora formed by the power of the extra-dimensional penetrated everything, directly shattering the combined attack of the three half-step extra-dimensional realms.

Although Ye Tian's superdimensional body refining degree was not high, it still surpassed their physical bodies, and the superdimensional power also surpassed them.

Moreover, Ye Tian's foundation is too terrifying, and the super-dimensional Dao species are also perfect super-dimensional Dao species.

What do they use to fight Ye Tian?

"It's not good, this guy is too wicked, run!"

The three half-step extra-dimensional realms were terrified, but they didn't expect to kick the iron plate, and the half-step extra-dimensional realm that they casually dealt with turned out to be the most demonic half-step extradimensional realm.

But at this moment, the terrifying extradimensional realm was suppressed, and then the endless extradimensional light directly crushed their bodies again and again.

They also have a lot of hole cards, and there are also a lot of life-saving things, but after a few breaths, all the treasures are exhausted.

"Spare your life!"

They begged for mercy, but Ye Tian wouldn't let them go at all.

If they didn't drive themselves and didn't do anything to themselves, he wouldn't bother to pay attention to it, but these three half-step transcendent realms dared to attack him and disturb him to comprehend the traces of transcendent rules, that is, to seek death.

From beginning to end, Ye Tian did not move.

After killing the three half-step extradimensional realms, he continued to comprehend the traces of extradimensional rules here.

And the corpses of the three half-step extradimensional realms, he didn't deal with them, so he let them lie there, so as to deter other half-step extradimensional realms who dared to spy here.

Of course, if there is an extradimensional realm eyeing here, then he can only consider himself unlucky.

But. []

There are not many traces of the extradimensional rules here here, and the extradimensional realm may not be visible.

In the following days, some half-step extradimensional realms passed by this area, and they also sensed traces of extradimensional rules, but as soon as they found the corpses of three half-step extradimensional realms, they were extremely shocked, because the aura of the corpses of these three half-step extradimensional realms was terrifying, and they were the top half-step extradimensional realms, and they fell here.

Therefore, they were all scared and didn't dare to disturb Ye Tian, so they stayed away from here one by one.

Of course, there were also half-step extradimensional realms that thought that their strength was invincible and wanted to kill Ye Tian, but they were killed by Ye Tian on the spot.

Gradually, there were more half-step extradimensional realm corpses here.

this day.

Ye Tian's replica body was not very good, and it was exhausted by the strange blood pupil.

He immediately re-copied a duplicate body, replaced it, and continued to comprehend the traces of extradimensional rules.

Of course.

He is not a trace of the extradimensional rules here, and the other copy bodies often buy information from the Sky Pavilion, and learn the latest information about the Annihilation Land of the Seven Thousand and One Territory.

If there is any great opportunity, it would be a pity if he missed it.

Gradually, an extradimensional era passed.

After Ye Tian's comprehension for such a long time, this trace of extradimensional rules was about to dissipate.

And after such a long period of comprehension, Ye Tian also has a certain understanding of the extradimensional rules, but he is still far from comprehending the extradimensional rules.

If the percentage is divided between the power of the consummation of the extradimensional (the good of the promise) and the extradimensional rules, he should be in the realm of ten percent now, and if he finds a dozen more traces of the extradimensional rules, and then contemplates a dozen extradimensional epochs, maybe he will have the hope of comprehending a trace of the extradimensional rules.

Of course, it is also possible that you may not be able to comprehend, after all, the closer you get to the level of comprehension, the more difficult it will be to comprehend, and maybe you will fall into a bottleneck.

"It is difficult to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules, and it is difficult to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules for the infinite years of cultivation in the extra-dimensional realm, once comprehended, it is the extra-dimensional realm of the second realm!"

"I'm only half-step in the realm of transcendence now, just comprehend the traces of transcendental rules, how can it be so easy to comprehend!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he has a certain understanding of extradimensional rules, which will be of great help to him in creating more powerful extradimensional techniques, and maybe even create extradimensional techniques that involve a trace of the mysteries of extradimensional rules.

In that case, his strength can be improved by a cut.
